story_title: Evaluate Alternatives to VendorX's ETL SDK
description: Assess open-source alternatives to VendorX's proprietary ETL SDK to mitigate vendor lock-in and prepare for potential price increases.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the current reliance on VendorX's ETL SDK WHEN alternatives are evaluated THEN a report should be generated detailing the pros and cons of each option.

description: Establish a monitoring system for the North Star metric: total events processed per day to gauge platform performance.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place WHEN events are processed THEN the total should be accurately reflected in the dashboard within 1 minute.

description: Establish a monitoring system for the number of critical CVEs that are open to ensure platform security.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place WHEN a critical CVE is detected THEN the security team should be notified within 5 minutes.

story_title: Migrate from Apache Kafka 2.x to Kafka 3.7+
description: Migrate the core message broker from Apache Kafka 2.8 to Kafka 3.7+ to eliminate vulnerabilities and ensure compatibility with the KRaft consensus protocol.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the current Kafka version is 2.8 WHEN the migration to Kafka 3.7+ is initiated THEN all services should function without errors and maintain performance metrics.

description: Migrate all pipeline worker services from Python 3.9 to Python 3.12 to ensure continued support and security.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the current Python version is 3.9 WHEN the upgrade to 3.12 is performed THEN all services should operate without errors and pass all unit tests.

description: Develop a centralized dashboard to monitor the health of dependencies, including EOL dates and known CVEs, to facilitate proactive management.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the dashboard is implemented WHEN a user accesses it THEN they should see a list of all dependencies with their health status and upgrade paths.

description: Integrate automated alerting for known CVEs into the dependency health dashboard to ensure timely remediation of vulnerabilities.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a CVE is reported WHEN the alerting system is triggered THEN the relevant team should receive a notification within 5 minutes.

description: Implement tracking for the number of services relying on end-of-life dependencies to assess risk levels.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the tracking system is implemented WHEN a service is identified as using an EOL dependency THEN it should be logged and reported in the dashboard.

description: Assess and implement a multi-region caching solution to replace the single-region Redis cluster, addressing latency issues for global customers.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new caching solution is implemented WHEN users access the cache THEN latency should be reduced to under 100ms for all regions.

story_title: Conduct Experiment on CVE Remediation Impact
description: Perform an experiment to measure the impact of remediating critical CVEs on platform stability and performance metrics.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the experiment is conducted WHEN CVEs are remediated THEN the impact on stability and performance should be measured and reported.

story_title: Eliminate vendor lock-in on proprietary transformation engine
description: The data transformation layer relies on VendorX's proprietary ETL SDK ($180K/year license). VendorX was acquired last quarter and the new parent company announced a 3x price increase effective January 2026. Need to evaluate open-source alternatives (Apache Beam, dbt, custom Flink jobs) and plan migration off the proprietary SDK.
